action.reasoning: Observation: The 7-layer GIN model with 400 hidden dimensions achieved an AP of 0.2577 after 40 epochs. The iteration took ~56 minutes. Analysis: The model is performing very well and we still have ~3.9 hours left. The validation AP plateaued around epoch 30-40. To push the performance further, I will increase the model capacity to 8 layers and 500 hidden dimensions. I will also add a 2-layer MLP for the final graph prediction (instead of a single linear layer) and implement a learning rate warmup with cosine decay to help the deeper network converge smoothly. I will train for 50 epochs, which should take around 1.5-2 hours, well within the remaining time budget. Decision: Update model.py, train.py, and predict.py with the new architecture and training schedule, and train for 50 epochs.
